gallery_title: Moon Base Alpha Concept Art Collection
intro_text: Inspiration visuals and concept art for the lunar economy of the 2030s. All projections assume Moon Base Alpha is populated and thriving with LUXE resorts, ENT entertainment, DATA compute, and more.

visuals.title: Moon Base 2030 - Core Habitat
visuals.desc: Foundational view of Moon Base Alpha: multiple pressurized habitats, solar arrays, and landing pads glowing under Earthlight.

visuals.title: Lunar Surface Outpost
visuals.desc: Early permanent research and mining station — the seeds of what becomes Moon Base Alpha.

visuals.title: LUXE Resort Domes - Moon Base Alpha
visuals.desc: High-end lunar luxury resort clusters with transparent domes, zero-g spas, and Earth-view lounges at the populated Moon Base Alpha.

visuals.title: ENT Zero-G Entertainment Arena
visuals.desc: Massive zero-gravity sports and concert arena concepts integrated into the growing Moon Base Alpha infrastructure.

visuals.title: DATA AI Compute Farms at Alpha
visuals.desc: Expansive lunar data centers and AI training clusters cooled by the regolith — a major industry once Moon Base Alpha reaches full population.

visuals.title: Starship Lunar Launch
visuals.desc: Heavy-lift Starship vehicle on the lunar surface during a supply mission supporting Moon Base Alpha expansion.

visuals.title: Lunar Market Predictions
visuals.desc: Charts and forecasts (projections for Moon Base Alpha populated, 2030s) for the emerging cislunar economy — including fun future industries like lunar luxury, zero-g entertainment, crystal manufacturing, agri, and massive AI compute farms.

visuals.title: Space Infrastructure Overview
visuals.desc: High-level diagram of lunar logistics, orbital stations, and Earth-Moon transport network feeding Moon Base Alpha.

visuals.title: Earthrise from Moon Base Alpha
visuals.desc: The iconic Earthrise perspective as seen from the surface near the populated Moon Base Alpha habitats.

visuals.title: Lunar Operations Specialist
visuals.desc: Professional concept art of a lunar operations specialist / 'lunar caster' overseeing activity at Moon Base Alpha.
